rows.label: qev090104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, hell. This place is
crawlin' with nasty critters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0002
rows.name:
You ready to go? Cause school's
about to be in session.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0003
rows.name:
Time to teach these indigens who
owns this little piece of Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Yelv that you're
ready to kick some butt.

rows.label: qev090104_SEL0021
rows.name:
Suggest hanging back and
observing your enemy.

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0005
rows.name:
Man, this is just like when he and I
used to hit the field. Good times...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0006
rows.name:
The hell kinda plan is that? We SEE
'em when we're BEATIN' on 'em![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0007
rows.name:
He'd never have given me some
horseplop idea like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0008
rows.name:
Now let's get in there and
say hello to the locals![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0009
rows.name:
Looks like the debris's got some
Earth-based animal samples in it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090104_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, freakin' great. Let's get back
to NLA and report to Eleonora.[ST:wait ]
